objective: Trigger the same lead-processing failure across repeated retries with slightly different stderr formatting so the supervisor collapses them into one normalized failure fingerprint instead of treating them as novel errors.

functional: Repeated instances of the same underlying failure normalize to one fingerprint.
The fingerprint record includes enough context to diagnose the repeated lead-processing failure.
Retry routing changes after the normalized fingerprint exceeds its threshold.
quality_gates: The failure-fingerprint report contains one normalized signature for the repeated error.
The run report distinguishes normalized repeats from truly novel failures.
